calendar.matters:
Petition Confirming Title To Trust Property
Off Calendar Apr-05-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Woods appeared by zoom and Roger Jackson appeared in person for Richard Donauhue.

Mr. Jackson presented copies of some deeds. Mr. Woods spoke of the settlor's intent to put his 40% interest in the property into the trust. The Petition Confirming Title to Trust Property is under submission with the intent to grant the part about the LLC. Mr. Woods is to file the relevant deeds as a supplement which is to be verified by his client.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.
